question: List the first names of the students who do not have any answers.
sql: SELECT First_Name FROM Students WHERE Student_ID NOT IN (SELECT Student_ID FROM Student_Answers)

back_translation.intent: 获取未在Student_Answers表中出现的学生的First_Name
filters: Student_ID NOT IN (SELECT Student_ID FROM Student_Answers)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求获取无答案记录的学生姓名，SQL描述通过Student_ID NOT IN子查询准确实现了这一逻辑，且未涉及无关的聚合、分组、排序等操作。
